form.formComment: Last outing finished 11th of 18 runners at Compiegne on March 23 over 3800m, slow track; 15 len behind Haut Les Coeurs with 69kg at $22. Before that pulled up at Auteuil in the LR on February 14 over 3600m. Fought on last time. Certainly worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Last outing finished 11th of 18 runners at Compiegne on March 23 over 3800m, slow track; 15 len behind Haut Les Coeurs with 69kg at $22. Before that pulled up at Auteuil in the LR on February 14 over 3600m. Fought on last time. Certainly worth another chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming pulled up at Saint Brieuc on February 15 over 3800m. Second run from a spell finished seventh of 13 starters at Argentan on March 6 over 3600m, slow track; 18 len behind Vismie with 66kg at $41. Has the ability to be in the finish. Certainly worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-12). Third-up today. Resuming pulled up at Saint Brieuc on February 15 over 3800m. Second run from a spell finished seventh of 13 starters at Argentan on March 6 over 3600m, slow track; 18 len behind Vismie with 66kg at $41. Has the ability to be in the finish. Certainly worth another chance.

form.formComment: Last outing lost his rider at Auteuil on March 28 over 3500m. Run before finished third of 8 runners at Saumur on March 8 over 4100m, 9 len behind Lucy Locket carrying 70kg. Has been racing well. Rates well and is worth consideration.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Last outing lost his rider at Auteuil on March 28 over 3500m. Run before finished third of 8 runners at Saumur on March 8 over 4100m, 9 len behind Lucy Locket carrying 70kg. Has been racing well. Rates well and is worth consideration.

form.formComment: Comes off a 30 day let-up. Last outing finished seventh of 10 runners at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3800m, slow track; 17 len behind Inner Success with 69kg at $51. The start before that; finished sixth of 11 runners at Pau on February 8 over 3800m, on heavy track; 35 len behind Le Lascar carrying 69kg at $11. Hard to beat in this suitable event.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Comes off a 30 day let-up. Last outing finished seventh of 10 runners at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3800m, slow track; 17 len behind Inner Success with 69kg at $51. The start before that; finished sixth of 11 runners at Pau on February 8 over 3800m, on heavy track; 35 len behind Le Lascar carrying 69kg at $11. Hard to beat in this suitable event.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming pulled up at Angers on February 24 over 3800m. Last start fell at Machecoul on March 8 over 3900m. Fought on last time. Will strip fitter and can make amends.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third-up today. Resuming pulled up at Angers on February 24 over 3800m. Last start fell at Machecoul on March 8 over 3900m. Fought on last time. Will strip fitter and can make amends.

form.formComment: Resumes after five months. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Nantes November 24 over 3900m. First up last campaign didn't finish the race at Auteuil September 27 over 3900m. Fitness an issue. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resumes after five months. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Nantes November 24 over 3900m. First up last campaign didn't finish the race at Auteuil September 27 over 3900m. Fitness an issue. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Last start finished second of 11 starters at Toulouse on March 18 over 4200m, slow track; 5.5 len behind Drop carrying 69.5kg at $12. Before that was disqualified at Pau on February 6 over 4000m. Progressing well this campaign. Hard to beat in this suitable contest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Last start finished second of 11 starters at Toulouse on March 18 over 4200m, slow track; 5.5 len behind Drop carrying 69.5kg at $12. Before that was disqualified at Pau on February 6 over 4000m. Progressing well this campaign. Hard to beat in this suitable contest.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after 11 months finished third of 14 runners at Argentan on March 6 over 3600m, on slow going 12 len behind Neo Chiron with 66kg at $5.90. Previously second-up finished sixth of 13 runners at Auteuil on April 20 over 3600m, on slow going 14 len behind Le Bon Samaritain carrying 65kg at $13. Warrants thought.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7.5). Having second run back today. First-up after 11 months finished third of 14 runners at Argentan on March 6 over 3600m, on slow going 12 len behind Neo Chiron with 66kg at $5.90. Previously second-up finished sixth of 13 runners at Auteuil on April 20 over 3600m, on slow going 14 len behind Le Bon Samaritain carrying 65kg at $13. Warrants thought.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up finished fifth of 11 starters at Auteuil on March 7 over 3900m, on slow going 10 len behind For Friendship with 71kg at $3.80. Last start lost his rider at Auteuil on March 28 over 3500m. Fitter now and making headway every start. Rates well and bold showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up finished fifth of 11 starters at Auteuil on March 7 over 3900m, on slow going 10 len behind For Friendship with 71kg at $3.80. Last start lost his rider at Auteuil on March 28 over 3500m. Fitter now and making headway every start. Rates well and bold showing expected.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished 13th of 14 runners at Machecoul on February 10 over 2350m, in the wet; 32 len behind Never Come Back with 58kg at $26. Second run from a spell raced behind the speed prior to fading finished 12th of 18 runners at Compiegne on March 23 over 3800m, on slow going 16 len behind Haut Les Coeurs with 68kg at $30. Has ability but prepared to risk.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Third-up today. First-up finished 13th of 14 runners at Machecoul on February 10 over 2350m, in the wet; 32 len behind Never Come Back with 58kg at $26. Second run from a spell raced behind the speed prior to fading finished 12th of 18 runners at Compiegne on March 23 over 3800m, on slow going 16 len behind Haut Les Coeurs with 68kg at $30. Has ability but prepared to risk.

form.formComment: Freshened for 59 days. Last outing lost his rider at Pau on February 8 over 3800m. Race before pulled up at Pau on January 23 over 3800m. Will need to lift. Looking elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Freshened for 59 days. Last outing lost his rider at Pau on February 8 over 3800m. Race before pulled up at Pau on January 23 over 3800m. Will need to lift. Looking elsewhere.

form.formComment: Comes off a 30 day let-up. Last start pulled up at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 4400m. The start before that; finished eighth of 11 starters at Durtal on February 1 over 4000m, on rain affected going; a 0.0 len behind L'aureole carrying 64kg. Not going well enough. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation didn't finish the race at Auteuil November 5 over 3600m. First up last campaign didn't finish the race at Auteuil October 18 over 3900m. Hard to see him in the placings.
